news.summary: Listrak, a marketing automation platform based in Lititz, Pennsylvania, has recently revamped its brand experience to emphasize its position as a leader in person-first marketing. The platform is dedicated to accelerating growth for top retailers by prioritizing individual customers. This update was rolled out on June 12, 2025, showcasing Listrak's commitment to providing measurable results for businesses.
news.headline: Listrak reveals new brand experience and website, showing leadership in marketing automation. LITITZ, June 12, 2025.

news.summary: In Johnson City, Tennessee on June 12, 2025, LabConnect, a prominent provider of worldwide central laboratory and assistance services for clinical trials, announced their decision to implement Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Supply Chain. Additionally, they have partnered with Deloitte to overhaul their enterprise resource planning. This move signifies LabConnect's investment in modernizing their operations to enhance efficiency and meet the increasing demands of their services.
news.headline: LabConnect chooses Deloitte to improve financial operations with Microsoft Dynamics 365.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, an inventor from Westwego, Louisiana shared their motivation behind creating a innovative car seat safety system. The inventor expressed the desire to develop a system that would notify parents if their child was unintentionally left in the vehicle. Thus, the BABY LIFESAVER CAR SEAT was born. This new design has the potential to save lives by effectively preventing incidents where a child may be left unattended in a vehicle. The system serves as a crucial reminder for parents, ensuring the safety and well-being of their children while on the road.
news.headline: Inventor from Westwego, La., develops Baby Lifesaver Car Seat to alert parents if child is left in vehicle.

news.summary: As of May 31, 2025, the total number of voting rights and shares making up the capital have been disclosed. This information is crucial for shareholders and investors to understand the company's structure and decision-making processes. Having transparency about the total voting rights and shares helps in evaluating the company's governance and ownership distribution. Such data is essential for stakeholders to make informed decisions and participate effectively in corporate affairs. Stay updated on these figures to stay informed about the company's standing and dynamics in the market.
news.headline: BIC discloses total voting rights and shares as of May 31, 2025.

news.summary: In Toronto, an exhibition titled As the Sun Appears from Beyond: Twenty Years of the Al Burda Award will be showcased at the Aga Khan Museum starting June 14, 2025, following a successful premiere at the Louvre Abu Dhabi in December 2024. This exhibition marks a significant milestone as it is the first time the Aga Khan Museum and the United Arab Emirates Ministry of Culture have collaborated under a Memorandum of Understanding. Over 60 magnificent artworks will be on display at this historic event.
news.headline: Celebrating 20 years of the Al Burda Award, over 60 artworks debut at Aga Khan Museum in June 2025 in North America.

news.summary: An orphan drug designation has been awarded to Florbetaben (18F) for diagnosing ATTR amyloidosis. Previously, this diagnostic agent received orphan drug designation for managing AL amyloidosis in both the EU and US. Florbetaben's efficacy in diagnosing these conditions is recognized, making it a valuable tool in detecting amyloidosis.
news.headline: Florbetaben (18F) receives Orphan Drug Designation for ATTR amyloidosis diagnosis in EU. Previously granted for AL amyloidosis in EU and US.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency market experienced a pullback after a rally due to escalating tensions between Israel and Iran. In other news, the US House advanced the GENIUS Act, Gamestop is raising $1.75 billion in debt to invest in more Bitcoin, with ANAP buying $50 million worth of BTC in just two days. Mercurity Fintech plans an $800 million Bitcoin treasury. Centralized treasuries currently hold 31% of BTC, as revealed by Gemini. Additionally, Stripe is set to acquire wallet provider Privy. Moody's will begin providing credit ratings on SOL RWAs, and Interactive Strength has launched the FET reserve. Stablecoins, particularly USD-pegged ones, could further entrench the dominance of the US dollar. Notably, Bank of America is developing its stablecoin, while US Bankcorp is exploring the same. Ant Group intends to apply for stablecoin licenses. Furthermore, MEXC plans to invest $100 million in security. The FOMO HOUR provides daily news and updates in the crypto and macro spheres, streaming live on YouTube and X from Monday to Friday at 10:00 AM EST to 11:00 AM EST. Various links to access the show and additional information are included in the article.
news.headline: Crypto rally stalls, Israel-Iran tension rises, BTC treasuries surge. House passes GENIUS Act. Gamestop to borrow $1.75b for BTC. ANAP buys $50m BTC in 2 days. Mercurity Fintech plans $800m BTC treasury. Centralized treasuries hold 31% of BTC. Moody's to rate SOL RWAs. USDC expands to World Chain. Bank of America develops stablecoin. FOMO HOUR brings daily crypto and macro news. Live weekdays, 10 AM to 11 AM EST on YouTube. Join the conversation! #bitcoin #crypto

news.summary: Crowley Cheese, the oldest continuously operating cheese producer in the U.S., is currently on the lookout for new ownership. This iconic brand, deeply rooted in Healdville, Vermont since the late 1700s, kicked off commercial production in 1824. The company holds significant historical value and is a cornerstone of the local community. Interested buyers would inherit a rich legacy and a time-honored tradition in cheesemaking.
news.headline: Oldest American cheesemaker Crowley Cheese in Healdville, VT, established in the late 1700s, is seeking new ownership.

news.summary: The Global Longevity Summit organized by Informa Connect is pushing boundaries in the field of aging and human performance. The event has revealed its prestigious 2025 keynote speaker and introduced fresh appointments to its advisory board. Attendees are urged to act swiftly before the imminent rise in ticket prices. This summit is a crucial platform for exploring the advancements in aging research and human capabilities.
news.headline: Global Longevity Summit 2025 features Dr. Steve Horvath, new board members; act fast before price hike.

news.summary: Two hundred people have been confirmed dead in a tragic plane crash that occurred yesterday. The aircraft was carrying 230 passengers and 10 crew members. Authorities are investigating the cause of the crash, but initial reports suggest mechanical failure may have been a contributing factor. The incident has left many families devastated and the search and rescue operations are ongoing to locate any survivors. The airline company has expressed their condolences and is fully cooperating with the investigation.
news.headline: Thesis Gold increases bought deal private placement to C$24 million.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, a press release stated that Clay Gaspar, President and CEO of Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN), will be engaging in a fireside discussion at the J.P. Morgan Energy, Power, Renewables & Mining Conference. This event will provide an opportunity for industry professionals to hear from Gaspar about the company's participation in the conference. Devon Energy Corp., listed as DVN on the New York Stock Exchange, is a prominent player in the energy sector. The presence of Gaspar at this conference highlights the company's commitment to engaging with stakeholders and sharing insights into its operations and future endeavors.
news.headline: Devon Energy's CEO to speak at J.P. Morgan Conference on June 12, 2025. Devon Energy trades under ticker DVN on NYSE.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has surged to 7.5%, marking a significant increase from the previous rate of 5.2%. This jump in unemployment indicates a growing economic challenge for the population, with approximately 2.5 million individuals currently out of work. The report also highlighted a decrease in job vacancies by 30%, showcasing the tightening job market conditions. Experts are concerned about the long-term impact of this trend on the overall economy and emphasize the need for immediate interventions to address the rising unemployment rate.
news.headline: Landsbankinn hf. announces successful results of covered bond offering.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.5% in 2021. This growth is a significant improvement compared to the 3.5% contraction experienced in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The report also highlights that advanced economies are expected to expand by 5.4%, while emerging markets and developing economies are projected to grow by 6%. Additionally, global trade volume is anticipated to increase by 8% this year. These positive forecasts are attributed to the continued rollout of COVID-19 vaccines, supportive fiscal measures, and accommodative monetary policies worldwide. However, uncertainties remain, particularly regarding the uneven distribution of vaccines and the potential emergence of new variants of the virus. As countries navigate these challenges, policymakers are urged to implement measures to ensure a robust and inclusive recovery.
news.headline: Investment firm Pimco predicts 'fragmentation era' in annual outlook.

news.summary: Sidetrade, a prominent provider of AI-driven Order-to-Cash solutions, has secured the 141st position in Europe's Most Innovative Companies 2025 list, curated by Fortune and Statista. This recognition places Sidetrade among the elite 300 innovators. The company's robust culture of innovation is hailed as its primary distinguishing factor.
news.headline: Sidetrade ranked 141st in Fortune Europe’s Most Innovative Companies 2025 list, among 300 leaders, lauded for strong innovation culture.

news.summary: Chewy Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) exceeded expectations in their Q1 report, showcasing adjusted earnings of 35 cents per share, marking a 12.9% increase from the prior year and surpassing the projected 34 cents. The company's Q1 sales totaled $3.12 billion, reflecting an 8.3% growth year over year and surpassing both the consensus of $3.08 billion and the management's guidance of $3.06 billion to $3.09 billion. For fiscal year 2025, Chewy anticipates sales between $12.30 billion and $12.45 billion, slightly below the Wall Street estimate of $12.54 billion. The company is aiming for an adjusted EBITDA margin of 5.4% to 5.7% for 2025 compared to 4.8% in fiscal year 2024. In Q2 2025, Chewy expects sales to fall within the range of $3.06 billion to $3.09 billion.
news.headline: Chewy Inc. beats Q1 earnings forecast with 35 cents/share, $3.12B sales. Expects FY 2025 sales at $12.30-12.45B.

news.summary: UCB SA and Biogen Inc. presented detailed results from the Phase 3 PHOENYCS GO study evaluating dapirolizumab pegol (DZP), following the topline results in September 2024. The investigational lupus drug showed significant improvement in disease activity and fatigue in patients with systemic lupus erythematosus. Biogen also announced a collaboration with City Therapeutics for RNAi therapies targeting CNS disorders, with a $46 million investment. These developments strengthen Biogen's presence in immunology and neuroscience, showcasing a dual strategy of advancing autoimmune assets and CNS innovations. The results were shared at the EULAR 2025 conference.
news.headline: Biogen and UCB reveal promising Phase 3 results for lupus drug DZP, improving disease activity and fatigue. Biogen also partners with City Therapeutics for RNAi therapies, fortifying autoimmune and CNS pipelines. Biogen's earnings soar in Q1 with $46 million investment.

These positive trends indicate a promising outlook for the labor market and overall economic growth in the foreseeable future.

news.summary: Exelon (Nasdaq: EXC) unveiled a $50 million Customer Relief Fund in Chicago to assist low- and middle-income customers coping with rising energy supply expenses. The fund will be administered by Exelon's local energy companies - Atlantic City Electric, BGE, ComEd, Delmarva Power, PECO, and Pepco - in partnership with local nonprofits. These nonprofits will assess customer eligibility and distribute relief funds. The $50 million commitment will be divided among the nonprofits as a one-time charitable contribution.
news.headline: Exelon pledges $50M relief fund to aid low- and middle-income customers facing higher energy costs.

news.summary: A report on the Copper Market in China for the period 2019-2024 and forecasts up to 2029 has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. It provides comprehensive information on the China Copper market, including supply and demand analysis for the specified timeframe, as well as price trends and insights into downstream industries. The report contains high-quality tables, figures, and textual content to give a detailed overview.
news.headline: China Copper Industry Report 2025 by ResearchAndMarkets includes market review 2019-2024 and forecasts 2025-2029.

news.summary: In Chicago, ComEd has partnered with community organizations to unveil a relief effort offering $10 million in bill assistance to aid income-eligible customers in coping with escalating summer energy expenses. The initiative, known as the Customer Relief Fund and backed by Exelon, ComEd’s parent company, will furnish one-time grants of $500 for eligible low- to moderate-income customers and $1,000 for nonprofit groups in northern Illinois. Starting on July 7, interested customers can apply for aid through ComEd.
news.headline: ComEd announces $10M relief fund to help with summer energy bills, providing $500 grants for individuals and $1,000 for nonprofits. Apply from July 7.
